description: Audits per-sample class assignments across four independent evidence sources (PCA, SV calls, GHSL, Clair3). Records which samples agree across all four, which disagree, and the specific disagreement patterns. This is NOT a validation test (C01f does that) — it's a diagnostic that helps identify misgenotyped samples or interesting biological cases (e.g., a sample the SV caller says is HOM_INV but PCA says HOM_REF might be carrying a different independent inversion).
question: Q3, Q6, Q7
group_validation_required: N/A — this block IS the reconciliation

sources_used.description: Which evidence sources were available for this candidate. Minimum 2 needed for any reconciliation.

n_total.description: Total samples with class call from ≥1 source

n_agreeing.description: Samples where ALL available sources agree

agreement_by_source_pair.description: Pairwise agreement fractions (PCA vs SV, PCA vs GHSL, etc.)
